questionHtml:
The input power of an electric motor is 200 W. It is used to raise a mass of 10 kg at constant speed.
If the efficiency of the motor is 40 %, through what height will the mass be raised in 1 second?


A.  0.5 m

B.  0.8 m

C.  1.2 m

D.  2.0 m
